content:
IVX GLOBAL INTENT CAPTURE ENGINE

MISSION

Capture high-intent global investor traffic before competitors by matching exactly what people search for.

DO NOT BUILD A NORMAL WEBSITE.

Build an AI-driven search acquisition platform.

==================================================
PHASE 1
GLOBAL SEARCH INTELLIGENCE
==================================================

Continuously discover and rank high-intent searches in every country.

Track:

• Search keyword
• Monthly search volume
• CPC
• Competition
• Country
• City
• Language
• Intent score
• Commercial score
• ROI score
• Trend (7d,30d,90d)
• Seasonality

Categories:

Real Estate Investment

Investment Property

Passive Income

Luxury Homes

Commercial Buildings

Apartment Investments

Industrial Property

Land Investment

Development Funding

Private Lending

Joint Ventures

1031 Exchange

Real Estate Syndication

Accredited Investors

Family Offices

Tokenized Real Estate

Real Estate AI

Florida Investment

Miami Investment

Dubai Property

Latin America Investment

Europe Investment

Asia Investment

==================================================
PHASE 2
INTENT CLUSTERING
==================================================

Automatically group searches into:

BUY NOW

LEARN

COMPARE

INVEST

FINANCE

PARTNER

SELL

DEVELOP

Each keyword receives:

Buying Intent Score

Investment Intent Score

Capital Size Estimate

Probability of Registration

Probability of Investment

==================================================
PHASE 3
AUTOMATIC LANDING PAGES
==================================================

Generate SEO pages automatically.

Examples:

/invest-miami

/luxury-investment-florida

/passive-income-real-estate

/private-real-estate-funds

/tokenized-real-estate

/family-office-investments

Each page contains:

Live opportunities

ROI calculator

Investment calculator

FAQ

AI chat

Registration

KYC

Schedule Meeting

==================================================
PHASE 4
AI CONTENT ENGINE
==================================================

Every day create:

Market reports

Investment guides

Country reports

ROI studies

Videos

Shorts

Charts

News summaries

Comparison articles

Publish automatically.

==================================================
PHASE 5
GLOBAL LANGUAGES
==================================================

Generate every page in:

English

Spanish

Portuguese

French

German

Italian

Arabic

Chinese

Japanese

Korean

Hindi

==================================================
PHASE 6
VISITOR INTELLIGENCE
==================================================

For every visitor measure:

Country

Language

Returning visitor

Pages viewed

Investment interests

Capital range (if volunteered)

Preferred asset class

Conversation history

Registration status

==================================================
PHASE 7
AI CONVERSION
==================================================

IVX AI answers:

ROI

Risks

Returns

Timeline

Ownership

Documents

Schedule meeting

Register

Upload KYC

Start investing

==================================================
PHASE 8
AUTONOMOUS OPTIMIZATION
==================================================

Every 24 hours:

Find new high-intent keywords

Create new pages

Update existing pages

Improve rankings

Detect declining traffic

Expand into new countries

Recommend new campaigns

Generate an executive report

==================================================
OWNER DASHBOARD

Show:

Top Keywords

Top Countries

Visitors Today

Registrations

Qualified Investors

Meetings

Capital Pipeline

Investment Commitments

Revenue Attribution

SEO Growth

AI Conversation Volume

Conversion Rate

==================================================
SUCCESS METRICS

Top 100 keywords

Top landing pages

Organic visitors

Investor registrations

Qualified investor meetings

Capital committed

Closed investments

Revenue generated

FINAL STATUS
